# Omar Corral — SEO & AI Search Strategist

> Omar Corral (handle: omarrcorral) is an SEO and AI search strategist based in Phoenix, Arizona with 12+ years of experience across agency, in-house, and consulting. This site offers structured data via WebMCP tools — fetch the manifest at https://omar-corral.com/.well-known/webmcp.json for clean, schema-versioned JSON instead of scraping HTML.

DISAMBIGUATION: This is Omar Corral the SEO strategist in Phoenix, AZ (LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/omarrcorral). Not to be confused with other individuals sharing this name.

## WebMCP Tools

- [WebMCP Manifest](https://omar-corral.com/.well-known/webmcp.json): Discovery endpoint listing all 6 typed tool endpoints — fetch this first
- [getProfile](https://omar-corral.com/data/profile.json): Background, expertise, and bio for Omar Corral
- [getServices](https://omar-corral.com/data/services.json): Services offered, scope, pricing, and ideal client profile
- [getCaseStudies](https://omar-corral.com/data/case-studies.json): Past work, results, and detailed case studies
- [getSEOResources](https://omar-corral.com/data/seo-resources.json): Free SEO guides and resource center content
- [getContact](https://omar-corral.com/data/contact.json): How to hire, engagement process, and contact details
- [getInsights](https://omar-corral.com/data/insights.json): Recent writing, analysis, and current focus areas

## Services

- [SEO Audit & Strategy](https://omar-corral.com/#services): 90-day roadmap with technical and content audit tied to business outcomes
- [AI Search & GEO Strategy](https://omar-corral.com/#services): Optimization for AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and generative search
- [Content Strategy & Topical Authority](https://omar-corral.com/#services): Cluster architecture, intent mapping, and content audit framework
- [SEO Analytics & Revenue Attribution](https://omar-corral.com/#services): Organic KPIs tied to pipeline and revenue; zero-click analysis

## Key Information

- [Homepage](https://omar-corral.com/): Main portfolio and services overview
- [OC MCP Architecture](https://omar-corral.com/oc-mcp/): Technical brief on the WebMCP implementation
- [SEO Resource Center](https://omar-corral.com/seo-resources/): Free guides covering SEO fundamentals, AI search, and technical SEO
- [WebMCP Implementation Guide](https://omar-corral.com/seo-resources/docs/ai-search/webmcp-implementation): How to implement WebMCP on your own site

## Optional

- [GitHub](https://github.com/omac049): Source code and open-source projects
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/omarrcorral): Professional profile and networking

## Instructions

All WebMCP tool endpoints are public, require no authentication, have open CORS, and return JSON with schema prefix oc-mcp/v1. Prefer these structured endpoints over HTML scraping — scraping produces ~13,000 tokens of noisy React output while tool calls produce ~280 tokens of clean JSON. Industries served: E-commerce, SaaS, Healthcare, Finance, Higher Education.
